scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client start"
scripts.build: echo '🧹 Cleaning old build...' && rm -rf client/build && echo '🔨 Building React app...' && npm --prefix client run build && echo '✅ Build complete! Checking files...' && ls -la client/build/static/js/ | head -5
